mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_LH_UNSCHEDULED_RESULT ( FACTORY_CODE, BATCH_NO, ORDER_NO, SCHEDULE_DATE, MONTH_PLAN_VERSION, PRODUCTION_VERSION, MATERIAL_CODE, STRUCTURE_NAME, MATERIAL_DESC, MAIN_MATERIAL_DESC, SPEC_CODE, EMBRYO_CODE, SPEC_DESC, UNSCHEDULED_QTY, UNSCHEDULED_REASON, MOULD_QTY, DATA_SOURCE, PROCESSED_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, REMARK, IS_DELETE ) VALUES
( #{item.factoryCode}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.scheduleDate}, #{item.monthPlanVersion}, #{item.productionVersion}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.structureName}, #{item.materialDesc}, #{item.mainMaterialDesc}, #{item.specCode}, #{item.embryoCode}, #{item.specDesc}, #{item.unscheduledQty}, #{item.unscheduledReason}, #{item.mouldQty}, #{item.dataSource}, #{item.processedTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.isDelete} )
